title: 宝塚記念の後に・背中は答えない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The battle at the Takarazuka Kinen ends with
Biwa Hayahide taking first place.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Ticket tells Hayahide how she
hopes they can stay rivals forever and always run
the best of races together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Biwa Hayahide replies that unlike when they
clashed at the Japanese Derby, she finds it
difficult to consider Winning Ticket her rival
anymore.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide tells her to think long and hard about
the reason why she races, leaving Ticket
dumbfounded.
